author: Caden McMann
name: Exact Sequence Matching on New SOTA Base
blurb: Eval-time exact N-gram sequence matching (orders 8-12). On the current SOTA base (PR #1019), improves the sliding window eval from 1.1152 to 1.1143 BPB with no retraining. See companion PR for the same technique on PR #549 + TTT.
